programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: Senior confronts Junior about his harsh words. Senior closes a huge deal with an exotic car dealership and Junior's simple mistake leads to destruction in the shop.

programme.title: NASCAR Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights of the 2026 NASCAR Cup Series as we follow 6 x Cup event winner and Kiwi, Shane van Gisbergen for his third season.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Farmtruck & Azn Down Und
programme.desc: In Brisbane, Farmtruck and AZN hunt for new races across Australia. An island adventure leads them to a friendly driver with a unique buggy, setting up a head-to-head showdown.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers
programme.desc: The Dirty 7 are back for more adrenaline-fuelled mega truck racing at The Pit, which has been redesigned with bigger jumps, faster speeds, and more mud!

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programme.desc: In an act of sheer desperation, Dustin Hurt gambles his entire future on a dangerous mining strategy. Will the risk lead to reward or ruin?

programme.title: Threenews
programme.desc: ThreeNews presents comprehensive coverage of global and local news.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Mouse and Jess must overcome their anxiety and administer adrenaline to a young woman suffering from an allergic reaction. S13 E9.

programme.title: Married At First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The Reunion Part 1. All the participants are back for one final dinner party and a lot of unfinished business.

programme.title: Movie: The Flash
programme.desc: Barry Allen goes back In time to change the events of his past. However, as a result, the world is devoid of its superheroes. Stars Ben Affleck.

programme.title: Will Trent
programme.desc: When a murder investigation reveals there's more to the story than meets the eye, Special Agent Will Trent relies on his keen instincts and unique experience to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral
programme.desc: A woman fights back against two carjackers, and a father sets up a sting to catch a sexual predator.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Atz Sr. take Jane on a hunt on horseback in the foothills. Eivin builds a motorized cart for Findlay, and there's a rush to fix a fence. S8 E13.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Texas family with dreams of a horse rescue. Misty builds a multi-tier garden and duck pond, and Marty constructs an innovative horse barn.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: With a major setback In Misty's build, the Raneys race the clock In their rescue of a Texas homestead. Matt builds a hog trap for an additional food resource.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Shaun and Lea go on a camping trip to distract themselves from their grief over their miscarriage; Morgan and Park argue about the best course of treatment for their patient.

programme.title: Pretty Little Liars
programme.desc: Aria, Emily, Hanna and Spencer finally get answers about the night Ali disappeared. With their newfound knowledge of Ali's long-held secrets, can they figure out who 'A' is?

programme.title: Married At First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The Reunion Part 1. All the participants are back for one final dinner party and a lot of unfinished business.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Bozoma pulls out all the stops for the first night in Italy. Erika questions Sutton's motive for choosing Amanda as her roommate. Rachel receives a troubling text from home.

programme.title: Lego Masters: Australia Vs The World
programme.desc: In the Grand Final, the three teams create amazing builds of their choosing. 200 members of the public, along with Brickman, will determine the winners of LEGO Masters 2024.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A family wants a home on the water with some breathing room and a pool in Merritt Island, Florida. S17 E9.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After years following her husband's military career, a photographer decides to call the shots with a move to Whitsunday Islands. S172 E2.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Canadian wants a more nature-infused life in Costa Rica. But meeting her big expectations in the small town of San Mateo may be challenging.

programme.title: Threenews
programme.desc: ThreeNews presents comprehensive coverage of global and local news.

programme.title: Married At First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The Reunion Finale. The participants are all back for one final couch session with the experts and first look at videos of their MAFS journey.

programme.title: Mafs: After The Dinner Party
programme.desc: After The Reunion: Unseen footage exposes a new side of Danny, Rachel and Steven confront their devastating split, Steph and Bec reconcile, and Stella and Filip celebrate their engagement.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: The task force heads to Philadelphia to probe a double homicide and the abduction of a 14-year-old girl, while Ray worries after his father is hospitalized from an accident.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Bozoma pulls out all the stops for the first night in Italy. Erika questions Sutton's motive for choosing Amanda as her roommate. Rachel receives a troubling text from home.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: It's Halloween and Buddy's eldest son wants a haunted house to match his spooky cake. Carlo's crew create an intricate carved pumpkin cake.
